name: bluez-firmware
title: bluez-firmware
description:
Firmware for Bluetooth devices
This firmware is required for operation of Bluetooth dongles based on
the Broadcom BCM203x and Raspberry Pi chipset.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bluez-firmware because Firmware for Bluetooth devices.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bluez-firmware as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bluez-firmware with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bluez-firmware --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
